# Code of Conduct

This project aims to be useful, respectful, and collaborative.

## Expected behavior

- Be respectful and constructive
- Assume good intent and discuss ideas, not people
- Share criticism with enough context to be actionable
- Protect user privacy and avoid posting sensitive data

## Unacceptable behavior

- Harassment, intimidation, or discriminatory language
- Doxxing, threats, or sustained hostility
- Publishing private credentials, raw private data, or exploit details in issues

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may edit, remove, or reject contributions and discussions that harm the project or community.
